file.content:
[package]
name = "neuro-integration-tests"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "Integration tests for CPU/GPU differential testing"

[dependencies]
neuro-types = { path = "../neuro-types" }
neuro-cpu = { path = "../neuro-cpu" }
neuro-core = { path = "../neuro-core" }
render_loop = { path = "../render_loop" }
api_bridge = { path = "../api_bridge" }
volmath = { path = "../volmath" }
loaders = { path = "../loaders" }

# Testing utilities
tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["full"] }
anyhow = "1.0"
nalgebra = { workspace = true }
approx = "0.5"
rand = "0.8"
image = "0.24"

[dev-dependencies]
criterion = "0.5"
tempfile = "3.8"

[[test]]
name = "cpu_gpu_differential"
path = "tests/cpu_gpu_differential.rs"

[[test]]
name = "slice_extraction_validation"
path = "tests/slice_extraction_validation.rs"

[[bench]]
name = "performance_comparison"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "ellipsoid_benchmarks"
harness = false
